_covenant: NFR-P5: every string Inward ever pushes at a person lives in this public directory, in every launch locale. Two exist; INV-4 forbids a third. Neutral copy only — no deltas, no urgency, no names of what was missed.

en.morning: The morning compass is open, when you are.
en.evening: The evening compass is open, when the day is done.

sk.morning: Ranný kompas je otvorený, keď budeš aj ty.
sk.evening: Večerný kompas je otvorený, keď je deň za tebou.
